hero.subtitle: No order caps. No per-review fees. Every plan unlocks unlimited orders and a 14-day trial on every paid tier.
hero.trustLine: From $19/mo · Others start at $29 · Cancel anytime

plans.name: Growth
plans.tagline: Scaling stores that need AI and integrations.

trustNote: All plans billed in USD. No per-order fees. No hidden charges. Cancel anytime.

items.q: Is there really a free plan?
items.a: Yes. Starter is free forever with unlimited orders, email requests, and product widgets. No card required.
Every paid plan comes with a 14-day free trial. After it ends, you auto-drop to Starter unless you choose to continue.

items.q: Do you charge per order or per review?
items.a: Never. Every tier has unlimited orders and unlimited reviews. You pay one flat price, period.
Anytime. Upgrade or downgrade in a click — charges are prorated to the day.

items.q: Can I import reviews from Junip, Judge.me or Loox?
items.a: Yes. One-click CSV import plus direct API migration — your social proof moves with you.

items.q: Is yearly billing a better deal?
items.a: Yep. Pick yearly and every paid tier drops 20% — basically two months free.

finalCta.subtitle: Install in one click, bring your existing reviews, and watch your storefront feel a little more alive by tomorrow.
